description: Understated yet elegant, this pair of designer cuff links from belmonte offers a refined finish to a formal shirt. This small accessory with its marble finish has a big impact on the look of a suit a perfect accompaniment for any light hued shirt.Width: 1.8 cmSquare cuff links made of steel, with marble-styled enamel finish in shades of purple on topHinged back to hold the cuff link in place
